test.name: IKEA_001 Verify that user cannot login with empty or invalid credentials

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "D:\\Robot framework\\Cam_Group_7\\testcases\\browser\\traces\\temp\\d6ee5f03-1934-47e9-a98c-ede7a44669a8"}

kw.name: New Context
kw.msg: { "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "forcedColors": "none", "ignoreHTTPSErrors": false, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "viewport": { "width": 1280, "height": 720 } }
Successfully created context.

{'acceptDownloads': True, 'bypassCSP': False, 'forcedColors': 'none', 'ignoreHTTPSErrors': False, 'javaScriptEnabled': True, 'offline': False, 'reducedMotion': 'no-preference', 'serviceWorkers': 'allow', 'viewport': {'width': 1280, 'height': 720}}
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.ikea.com/th

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[data-tracking-label="profile"][rel="nofollow"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[data-testid="login"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=.skapa-mvagent-wrapper-prefix-form-field__content at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'Please enter a valid email'
${e_email} = Please enter a valid email
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'camp_26@doppiotech.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[data-testid="login"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=.skapa-mvagent-wrapper-prefix-inline-message__content h6 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'There was a problem signing in'
${e_password1} = There was a problem signing in
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'It’s our fault, not yours. Please try again later to see if we can work it out.'
${e_password2} = It’s our fault, not yours. Please try again later to see if we can work it out.
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Camp123*' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[data-testid="login"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'The email address or password you entered is incorrect or the account does not exist in IKEA Thailand'
${e_no_id} = The email address or password you entered is incorrect or the account does not exist in IKEA Thailand
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Debug
kw.doc: Open a interactive shell, run any RobotFramework keywords.
